div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Chile (Collier)
div.p: 30. The Chilean Ambassador called on me this morning to discuss the question of Mexican participation in the approaching Pan American Conference. I have sent him today the following Aide-Memoire on the subject:

[Here follows the text of the aide-mémoire, which is the same, mutatis mutandis, as the aide-mémoire to the Brazilian Ambassador, quoted in the Department’s telegram no. 23, March 5, to the Ambassador in Brazil, printed on page 295.]
The above is for your confidential information only and requires no action on your part. Repeat to Lima, as Department’s [No.] 12, Buenos Aires as No. 8 and Montevideo as No. 7.
